vpEntries.content: A może by tak łomem?
How about a crowbar?
Why don't you try a crowbar?
Sam, kurwa, jesteś łomem. I gdzie byś go wsadził, co? Przecież tu nie ma szpary!
You're a crowbar yourself. And where would you put him? Hm? There is no gap here!
Why don't you try usin' your head for once? You see anywhere to wedge it in, huh?
Dobra, uspokój się... Pomóc tylko chciałem...
Okay, calm down ... I just wanted to help ...
All right, all right, I'm just tryna help, jeez...
Ej! Pst! Ktoś idzie!
Hey! Shh! Somebody is going!
Hey! Pst, pst, hey! Someone's comin'!
Widzę przecież! Stul pysk!
I can see! Shut up!
I'm not blind! And shut your mouth!
A ty tu czego? Co, fajka chcesz? Ja nie mam fajka. A ty, Rick?
What are you here? What, do you want a pipe? I don't have a pipe. And you, Rick?
Hey, you lost or somethin'? Sorry, don't got a map. 'Ey, Rick! You got a map?
A gdzie. Rzuciłem. Palenie szkodzi.
Where. I quit. Smoking is harmful.
Nope, used mine for smokes. Wherever you wanna be, sure as shit ain't here!
Słyszysz? Nic tu po tobie. Szerokiej drogi.
Do you hear? Nothing here after you. Wide road.
Hear that? Nothin' for you here. Have a nice day, now.
Nie zwracajcie na mnie uwagi.
Don't mind me.
Don't mind me.
Trochę ciężko, jak tak sterczysz obok. Może się przejdziesz gdzieś indziej, hm?
It's a little hard how you stand next to it. Maybe you'll go somewhere else, huh?
Kinda hard when you're hoverin' over us, eh? Don't you got somewhere to be?
Co jest w walizce?
What's in the suitcase?
What's in the briefcase?
Co, mówisz o tym śmieciu? Złom pewnie.
What are you talking about this rubbish? Scrap probably.
What, th-this piece of junk? Yeah, psh, prolly nothin'.
Mhm. Puszki. Albo może butelki.
Mhm. Cans. Or maybe bottles.
Mhm. Cans... uh, maybe bottles... heh, who knows?
Skąd macie tę walizkę? Przecież gołym okiem widać, że to sprzęt korporacyjny.
Where did you get this suitcase? After all, you can see with the naked eye that this is corporate equipment.
How'd you find that? Doesn't take an expert to see it's corp-owned.
A ty, co z biura rzeczy znalezionych? Nie twój interes, to się nie interesuj.
And you, what about the lost property office? It's not your business, don't be interested.
You from the lost and found or somethin'? 'Ey, if it isn't your biz, then don't go makin' it.
Kupię ją od was. Ile?
I will buy it from you. How much?
How much to take it off your hands?
Hm... No niech pomyślę...
Hmm ... Let me think ...
Hm... now lemme think...
Gdzie, pytam?!
Where, I ask ?!
I said, where?!
Te... T-te śmietniki, o t-tam...
Those ... T-bins, t-there ...
Th-those dumpsters, over there!
Kurwa, Josh...
Fuck, Josh ...
For fuck's sake, Josh...
To nie była nasza robota, okej? Koleś już nie żył. Słowo!
It wasn't our job, okay? Dude was already dead. Word!
Look, it wasn't us, all right? Gonk was already cold! We swear!
Serio? Bo wyglądacie jak zabójcy do wynajęcia. Zejdźcie mi z drogi.
Seriously? Because you look like hired killers. Get out of my way.
Wait, really? And here I had you pegged for top-tier mercs... Now get outta my way.
Wait, really? And here I had you pegged for top-tier mercs... Now, outta my way.
Dobra, bierz... I wrzuć, kurwa, na luz, co?
Fine... Take it... But, like, chill the fuck out, 'kay?
Ile? W dupach wam się poprzewracało.
How much? Your ass turned upside down.
Say what? You need to go get your heads checked.
Say what? You need to get your heads checked.
Nie podoba się, to nie kupuj.
Don't like it, don't buy it.
Don't like it, don't buy it.
Wiecie, że ta walizka oznacza kłopoty. Że takich rzeczy się nie gubi.
You know that this suitcase means trouble. That such things are not lost.
Stuff like that doesn't just get lost. Won't find anything in there, 'cept trouble...
Znalezione nie kradzione.
Found not stolen.
It wasn't stolen. We found it.
Fajny tekst. Ale kolesie, którzy jej szukają, nie będą z wami dyskutować.
Nice text. But the guys who are looking for her will not argue with you.
Whatever you say. Just know that whoever comes lookin'... won't be askin' questions.
Yeah, whatever you say. Just know that whoever comes lookin'... won't be askin' questions.
Ugh... Bez sensu.
Ugh ... pointless.
Ugh, forget it...
Ugh! Forget it...
Sezamie, otwórz się.
Sesame, open up.
Open sesame.
Dobra, nie chce mi się z wami gadać.
Okay, I don't want to talk to you.
You know what? I'm done talking to you both.
Nikt ci nie każe.
Nobody tells you.
Don't let us keep ya.
Josh, ty młocie, musiałeś się wygadać?!
Josh, you hammer, did you have to talk ?!
You just had to open your mouth, didn't ya?
A weź daj mi święty spokój.
Give me peace of mind.
Gimme a fuckin' break already!
Nie mam tyle przy sobie... Ale wrócę.
I don't have that much with me ... But I'll be back.
I'm short right now, but I'll be come up with somethin'.
Short right now, but I'll be come up with something.
Niech będzie. Zgoda.
Let it be. Agreement.
Fine. Here you go.
Ciekawe... Bardzo ciekawe.
Interesting ... Very interesting.
Well, look what we have here...
O...! Proszę, proszę...
Please please...
Well, I'll be damned...
Ty, patrz... Otworzyła ją! Serio!
Ty, patrz... Otworzył ją! Serio!
You, look ... She opened it! Seriously!
You, look ... He opened it! Seriously!
Hoooly... it opened! We're fuckin' rich!
Śmietniki... Czyli tam, gdzie była ta drzazga...
Dustbins ... That is where the splinter was ...
Dumpsters... same place the shard was...
Huh... Ciekawe, do czego to...
Huh ... I wonder what it's for ...
Huh... and where are you meant to go...?
Dawaj tę walizkę.
Give me that suitcase.
Give it to me. Now.
Spokojnie, szefowo, tylko spokojnie... Jakoś się dogadamy...
Spokojnie, szefuniu, tylko spokojnie... Jakoś się dogadamy...
Relax, boss, just relax ... Somehow we'll get along ...
Take it easy, boss, take it easy ... We'll get along somehow ...
Hey, hey, take it easy, boss... W-we can work something out, right? Come on...
Nie każ mi powtarzać.
Don't make me say it again.
Don't make me repeat myself.
Oddajcie jej tę walizkę. No, już.
Oddajcie mu tę walizkę. No, już.
Give her that suitcase back. Well now.
Give him that suitcase. Well now.
What're you waitin' for? Give it to 'im!
What're you waitin' for? Give it to 'er!
I tak jej nie otworzysz. Nie da się.
You won't open it anyway. It's not possible.
Trust me – you won't get it open anyway.
Przekonamy się. Gdzie ją znaleźliście?
We will find out. Where did you find her
We'll see about that. Where'd you find it?
Co jest w teczce?
What's in the briefcase?
What's in the briefcase?
Nie zwracajcie na mnie uwagi.
Don't mind me.
Don't mind me.
Kupię ją od was.
I will buy it from you.
I'll buy it off you.
Dawajcie walizkę, bo zastrzelę.
Give me the suitcase or I'll shoot you.
Give it to me. Now.
Wiecie, że ta walizka to problemy.
You know that this suitcase is a problem.
That briefcase is more trouble than it's worth.
Skąd ją macie?
Where did you get it from
How did you get it?
Dobra, nie chcę mi się z wami gadać.
Okay, I don't want to talk to you.
I'm done talking with you.
Zgoda.
Agreement.
Fine.
Nie mam tyle przy sobie.
I don't have that much with me.
I don't have that much.
W dupach wam się poprzewracało.
Your ass turned upside down.
You're out of your mind.
[hakuj]
[Hack].
[Hack]
[aktywuj]
[Activate].
[Activate]
[użyj drzazgi]
[Use splinters].
[Slot shard]
No gdzie, kurwa?!
Where?! Tell me!
